steps.title: Identify the uncertainty
steps.content: The passage says Bellamy was long thought to be the original author of the pledge. A newly discovered article from before August 1892 describes students reciting the same pledge, so Bellamy may not have created it after all.

steps.title: Rule out unrelated facts
steps.content: Choice A concerns later changes to the pledge. Choice B concerns students' preferences. Choice C concerns the name of a newspaper. The evidence instead makes the original authorship uncertain. The answer is D.
